        <! DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="pl">
        <głowa>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <meta Nazwa="Widok" Spis treści="szerokość=szerokość urządzenia, skala początkowa=1.0">
        <Tytuł>KUPR — Audio Forge</Tytuł>
        <Styl>
        @import URL('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&display=swap');
        :Korzenie {
        --bg: #0a0a0f;
        --panel: #11111a;
        --granica: #1e1e30;
        --akcent: #00ffaa;
        --akcent2: #FF3366;
        --akcent3: #7b5ea7;
        --tekst: #c8c8e0;
        --przyciemnione: #44445a;
        --poświata: 0 0 18px #00ffaa55;
        }
        * { Rozmiar pudełkowy: ramka ramowa; Margines: 0; Wypełnienie: 0; }
        Korpus {
        Tło: var(--bg);
        kolor: var(--tekst);
        rodzina czcionek: 'Kosmiczny Mono', monospace;
        Wysokość minimalna: 100VH;
        overflow-x: ukryty;
        Obraz tła:
        Gradient promieniowy(elipsa w 10% 20%, #7b5ea720 0%, przezroczysta 50%),
        Gradient promieniowy(elipsa w 90% 80%, #00ffaa10 0%, przezroczysta 50%);
        }
        Nagłówek {
        Ekspozycja: flex;
        align-items: w centrum;
        Luka: 18px;
        Wypełnienie: 18px 28px 14px;
        border-bottom: 1px solidny var(--granica);
        Tło: #0d0d18cc;
        Filtr tła: rozmycie(10px);
        Pozycja: lepki;
        top: 0;
        Indeks Z: 100;
        }
        .logo {
        rodzina czcionek: 'Bebas Neue', sans-szeryf;
        font-size: 2REM;
        Odstępy między literami: 4px;
        kolor: var(--akcent);
        tekst-cień: var(--poświata);
        }
        .logo Rozpiętość { kolor: var(--akcent2); }
        .Hasło {
        font-size: 0.65REM;
        kolor: var(--przyciemnione);
        Odstępy między literami: 3px;
        Transformacja tekstowa: wielkimi literami;
        }
        .status-dot {
        szerokość: 8px;
        Wysokość: 8px;
        Promień graniczny: 50%;
        Tło: var(--przyciemnione);
        Lewica na marginesie: auto;
        Przejście: Tło 0.3s;
        cień pudełkowy: żadnych;
        }
        .status-dot.Aktywny {
        Tło: var(--akcent);
        cień pudełkowy: var(--poświata);
        Animacja: mrugnięcie 1.4s nieskończony;
        }
        @keyframes blink {
        0%,100% { opacity: 1; }
        50% { opacity: 0.4; }
        }
        main {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 280px;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr;
        gap: 14px;
        padding: 16px 18px;
        max-width: 1300px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        }
        .panel {
        background: var(--panel);
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        border-radius: 6px;
        padding: 16px;
        position: relative;
        }
        .panel-label {
        font-size: 0.6rem;
        letter-spacing: 3px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--dim);
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .drop-zone {
        grid-column: 1 / 3;
        border: 2px dashed var(--border);
        border-radius: 6px;
        padding: 32px;
        text-align: center;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: border-color 0.3s, background 0.3s;
        position: relative;
        overflow: hidden;
        }
        .drop-zone:hover,
        .drop-zone.drag-over {
        border-color: var(--accent);
        background: #00ffaa08;
        }
        .drop-zone input { display: none; }
        .drop-icon { font-size: 2.4rem; margin-bottom: 8px; opacity: 0.6; }
        .drop-text { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--dim); letter-spacing: 2px; }
        .drop-text strong { color: var(--accent); }
        .spectrum-panel { grid-column: 1 / 2; }
        #spectrumCanvas {
        width: 100%;
        height: 140px;
        display: block;
        border-radius: 3px;
        background: #07070f;
        }
        .waveform-panel { grid-column: 1 / 2; }
        .waveform-wrap {
        position: relative;
        height: 100px;
        cursor: col-resize;
        background: #07070f;
        border-radius: 3px;
        overflow: hidden;
        user-select: none;
        }
        #waveCanvas {
        display: block;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        }
        .selection-overlay {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        height: 100%;
        background: #00ffaa22;
        border-left: 2px solid var(--accent);
        border-right: 2px solid var(--accent);
        pointer-events: none;
        display: none;
        }
        .playhead {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        bottom: 0;
        width: 2px;
        background: var(--accent2);
        pointer-events: none;
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--accent2);
        display: none;
        }
        .time-display {
        display: flex;
        gap: 20px;
        margin-top: 8px;
        font-size: 0.65rem;
        color: var(--dim);
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .time-display span b { color: var(--accent); }
        .transport {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        margin-top: 10px;
        }
        .btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        color: var(--text);
        padding: 8px 16px;
        border-radius: 3px;
        font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        letter-spacing: 1px;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        }
        .btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
        .btn.primary {
        border-color: var(--accent);
        color: var(--accent);
        box-shadow: 0 0 12px #00ffaa30;
        }
        .btn.primary:hover { background: #00ffaa18; }
        .btn.danger { border-color: var(--accent2); color: var(--accent2); }
        .btn.danger:hover { background: #ff336618; }
        .btn:disabled { opacity: 0.3; cursor: not-allowed; }
        .btn:disabled:hover {
        border-color: var(--border);
        color: var(--text);
        background: transparent;
        }
        .effects-panel { grid-column: 2; grid-row: 2 / 5; }
        .fx-section { margin-bottom: 22px; }
        .fx-title {
        font-size: 0.6rem;
        letter-spacing: 3px;
        text-transform: uppercase;
        color: var(--accent3);
        margin-bottom: 12px;
        padding-bottom: 6px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .fx-row {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .fx-name { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--dim); }
        .fx-val { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--accent); min-width: 34px; text-align: right; }
        input[type=range] {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        width: 100%;
        height: 3px;
        background: var(--border);
        border-radius: 2px;
        outline: none;
        margin: 4px 0 10px;
        }
        input[type=range]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
        -webkit-appearance: none;
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: var(--accent);
        box-shadow: 0 0 8px #00ffaa80;
        cursor: pointer;
        }
        .toggle-row {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        .toggle-label { font-size: 0.65rem; color: var(--dim); }
        .toggle {
        width: 36px;
        height: 18px;
        background: var(--border);
        border-radius: 9px;
        position: relative;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        .toggle.on { background: var(--accent); }
        .toggle::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        width: 14px;
        height: 14px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: #fff;
        top: 2px;
        left: 2px;
        transition: left 0.2s;
        }
        .toggle.on::after { left: 20px; }
        .clips-panel { grid-column: 1 / 2; }
        .clips-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
        .clip-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 10px;
        background: #0d0d18;
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        border-radius: 4px;
        padding: 8px 12px;
        font-size: 0.65rem;
        animation: slideIn 0.25s ease;
        }
        @keyframes slideIn {
        from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-6px); }
        to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .clip-color {
        width: 4px;
        height: 36px;
        border-radius: 2px;
        flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .clip-info { flex: 1; }
        .clip-name { color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 2px; }
        .clip-meta { color: var(--dim); font-size: 0.6rem; }
        .clip-play-btn {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        color: var(--accent);
        width: 28px;
        height: 28px;
        border-radius: 3px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 0.8rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .clip-play-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); background: #00ffaa15; }
        .clip-dl {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid var(--border);
        color: var(--dim);
        width: 28px;
        height: 28px;
        border-radius: 3px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 0.75rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        text-decoration: none;
        }
        .clip-dl:hover { border-color: var(--accent3); color: var(--accent3); }
        .clip-del {
        background: transparent;
        border: 1px solid transparent;
        color: var(--dim);
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
        border-radius: 3px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-size: 0.7rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        .clip-del:hover { color: var(--accent2); }
        .empty-clips {
        text-align: center;
        color: var(--dim);
        font-size: 0.65rem;
        letter-spacing: 2px;
        padding: 24px 0;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; height: 5px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--border); border-radius: 2px; }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
        main {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }
        .drop-zone { grid-column: 1; }
        .spectrum-panel,
        .waveform-panel,
        .clips-panel,
        .effects-panel {
        grid-column: 1;
        grid-row: auto;
        }
        }
        </style>
        </head>
        <body>
        <header>
        <div>
        <div class="logo">KU<span>P</span>R</div>
        <div class="tagline">Audio Forge · Real-time FX · Spectrum</div>
        </div>
        <div class="status-dot" id="statusDot"></div>
        </header>
        <main>
        <div class="drop-zone" id="dropZone" onclick="document.getElementById('fileInput').click()">
        <input type="file" id="fileInput" accept="audio/*">
        <div class="drop-icon">🎵</div>
        <div class="drop-text">Upuść plik audio lub <strong>kliknij</strong> aby wybrać</div>
        <div class="drop-text" style="margin-top:6px; font-size:0.6rem;">MP3 · WAV · OGG · FLAC · M4A</div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel spectrum-panel" id="spectrumPanel" style="display:none">
        <div class="panel-label">Widmo częstotliwości — FFT</div>
        <canvas id="spectrumCanvas"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div class="panel waveform-panel" id="wavePanel" style="display:none">
        <div class="panel-label">Przebieg falowy · <span style="color:var(--accent)">przeciągnij myszą</span> albo kliknij 2 razy aby zaznaczyć fragment</div>
        <div class="waveform-wrap" id="waveWrap">
        <canvas id="waveCanvas"></canvas>
        <div class="selection-overlay" id="selOverlay"></div>
        <div class="playhead" id="playhead"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="time-display">
        <span>Zaznaczenie: <b id="selStart">—</b> → <b id="selEnd">—</b></span>
        <span>Czas: <b id="curTime">0.00s</b></span>
        <span>Plik: <b id="fileLen">—</b></span>
        </div>
        <div class="transport">
        <button class="btn primary" id="btnPlay">▶ PLAY</button>
        <button class="btn" id="btnStop">■ STOP</button>
        <button class="btn" id="btnCut" disabled>✂ WYTNIJ FRAGMENT</button>
        <button class="btn danger" id="btnClear">⊘ WYCZYŚĆ</button>
        </div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel effects-panel" id="fxPanel" style="display:none">
        <div class="panel-label">Efekty — Real-time</div>
        <div class="fx-section">
        <div class="fx-title">⚡ Kupr / Chorus</div>
        <div class="toggle-row">
        <span class="toggle-label">Włączony</span>
        <div class="toggle on" id="toggleChorus"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Głębokość</span><span class="fx-val" id="vDepth">0.60</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sDepth" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="0.6">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Szybkość (Hz)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vRate">2.5</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sRate" min="0.1" max="8" step="0.1" value="2.5">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Opóźnienie (ms)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vDelay">25</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sDelay" min="1" max="50" step="1" value="25">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Mix (Wet)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vMix">0.50</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sMix" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="0.5">
        </div>
        <div class="fx-section">
        <div class="fx-title">🌊 Pogłos (Reverb)</div>
        <div class="toggle-row">
        <span class="toggle-label">Włączony</span>
        <div class="toggle" id="toggleReverb"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Czas (s)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vRevTime">1.5</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sRevTime" min="0.1" max="6" step="0.1" value="1.5">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Mix</span><span class="fx-val" id="vRevMix">0.30</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sRevMix" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="0.3">
        </div>
        <div class="fx-section">
        <div class="fx-title">🎚 Equalizer</div>
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Basy (dB)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vBass">0.0</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sBass" min="-12" max="12" step="0.5" value="0">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Środek (dB)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vMid">0.0</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sMid" min="-12" max="12" step="0.5" value="0">
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Wysokie (dB)</span><span class="fx-val" id="vTreb">0.0</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sTreb" min="-12" max="12" step="0.5" value="0">
        </div>
        <div class="fx-section">
        <div class="fx-title">🔊 Głośność</div>
        <div class="fx-row"><span class="fx-name">Gain</span><span class="fx-val" id="vGain">1.0</span></div>
        <input type="range" id="sGain" min="0" max="3" step="0.05" value="1">
        </div>
        </div>
        <div class="panel clips-panel" id="clipsPanel" style="display:none">
        <div class="panel-label">Wycięte fragmenty</div>
        <div class="clips-list" id="clipsList">
        <div class="empty-clips">Zaznacz fragment i kliknij ✂ WYTNIJ</div>
        </div>
        </div>
        </main>
        <script>
        let audioCtx = null;
        let audioBuffer = null;
        let source = null;
        let analyser = null;
        let gainNode = null;
        let bassFilter = null, midFilter = null, trebFilter = null;
        let chorusNodes = null;
        let isPlaying = false;
        let startedAt = 0;
        let pausedAt = 0;
        let selStartSec = null;
        let selEndSec = null;
        let isDragging = false;
        let dragStartX = 0;
        let dragMoved = false;
        let suppressNextClick = false;
        let clickSelectStart = null;
        let playheadFrame = null;
        let spectrumFrame = null;
        let clips = [];
        let clipColors = ['#00ffaa','#ff3366','#7b5ea7','#ffcc00','#00bfff','#ff7700'];
        let colorIdx = 0;
        let fileName = 'audio';
        let chorusOn = true;
        let reverbOn = false;
        const MIN_SELECTION_SEC = 0.05;
        const dropZone = document.getElementById('dropZone');
        const waveWrap = document.getElementById('waveWrap');
        const selOverlay = document.getElementById('selOverlay');
        const playhead = document.getElementById('playhead');
        const btnCut = document.getElementById('btnCut');
        const btnPlay = document.getElementById('btnPlay');
        const btnStop = document.getElementById('btnStop');
        const btnClear = document.getElementById('btnClear');
        async function initCtx() {
        if (audioCtx) return;
        audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
        }
        document.getElementById('fileInput').addEventListener('change', e => {
        if (e.target.files[0]) loadFile(e.target.files[0]);
        });
        dropZone.addEventListener('dragover', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        dropZone.classList.add('drag-over');
        });
        dropZone.addEventListener('dragleave', () => {
        dropZone.classList.remove('drag-over');
        });
        dropZone.addEventListener('drop', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        dropZone.classList.remove('drag-over');
        if (e.dataTransfer.files[0]) loadFile(e.dataTransfer.files[0]);
        });
        async function loadFile(file) {
        await initCtx();
        stopPlayback();
        fileName = file.name.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
        const reader = new FileReader();
        reader.onload = async ev => {
        try {
        audioBuffer = await audioCtx.decodeAudioData(ev.target.result);
        selStartSec = null;
        selEndSec = null;
        clickSelectStart = null;
        isDragging = false;
        dragMoved = false;
        suppressNextClick = false;
        showPanels();
        resizeSpectrum();
        setTimeout(drawWaveform, 50);
        document.getElementById('fileLen').textContent = fmt(audioBuffer.duration);
        document.getElementById('statusDot').classList.add('active');
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        updateSelLabels();
        } catch (e) {
        alert('Nie można zdekodować pliku audio: ' + e.message);
        }
        };
        reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file);
        }
        function showPanels() {
        ['spectrumPanel', 'wavePanel', 'fxPanel', 'clipsPanel'].forEach(id => {
        document.getElementById(id).style.display = '';
        });
        document.getElementById('dropZone').style.display = 'none';
        }
        function cleanupSource() {
        if (source) {
        try { source.stop(0); } catch (e) {}
        try { source.disconnect(); } catch (e) {}
        source = null;
        }
        if (chorusNodes && chorusNodes.lfo) {
        try { chorusNodes.lfo.stop(0); } catch (e) {}
        }
        chorusNodes = null;
        }
        function buildGraph(buffer) {
        cleanupSource();
        source = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
        source.buffer = buffer;
        analyser = audioCtx.createAnalyser();
        analyser.fftSize = 2048;
        analyser.smoothingTimeConstant = 0.8;
        bassFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        bassFilter.type = 'lowshelf';
        bassFilter.frequency.value = 200;
        bassFilter.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sBass').value);
        midFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        midFilter.type = 'peaking';
        midFilter.frequency.value = 1000;
        midFilter.Q.value = 1;
        midFilter.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sMid').value);
        trebFilter = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        trebFilter.type = 'highshelf';
        trebFilter.frequency.value = 5000;
        trebFilter.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sTreb').value);
        gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
        gainNode.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sGain').value);
        source.connect(bassFilter);
        bassFilter.connect(midFilter);
        midFilter.connect(trebFilter);
        trebFilter.connect(gainNode);
        let last = gainNode;
        if (chorusOn) {
        const dry = audioCtx.createGain();
        const wet = audioCtx.createGain();
        const mix = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sMix').value);
        dry.gain.value = 1 - mix;
        wet.gain.value = mix;
        const delay1 = audioCtx.createDelay(0.1);
        const delay2 = audioCtx.createDelay(0.1);
        const delayMs = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sDelay').value) / 1000;
        delay1.delayTime.value = delayMs;
        delay2.delayTime.value = delayMs * 0.9;
        const lfo = audioCtx.createOscillator();
        lfo.type = 'sine';
        lfo.frequency.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRate').value);
        const lfoGain = audioCtx.createGain();
        lfoGain.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sDepth').value) * 0.005;
        lfo.connect(lfoGain);
        lfoGain.connect(delay1.delayTime);
        lfoGain.connect(delay2.delayTime);
        lfo.start();
        const chorusMix = audioCtx.createGain();
        last.connect(dry);
        last.connect(delay1);
        last.connect(delay2);
        delay1.connect(wet);
        delay2.connect(wet);
        dry.connect(chorusMix);
        wet.connect(chorusMix);
        chorusNodes = { lfo, delay1, delay2 };
        last = chorusMix;
        }
        if (reverbOn) {
        const convolver = audioCtx.createConvolver();
        convolver.buffer = makeImpulse(parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRevTime').value));
        const revWet = audioCtx.createGain();
        const revDry = audioCtx.createGain();
        const revMix = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRevMix').value);
        revWet.gain.value = revMix;
        revDry.gain.value = 1 - revMix;
        const revOut = audioCtx.createGain();
        last.connect(revDry);
        last.connect(convolver);
        convolver.connect(revWet);
        revDry.connect(revOut);
        revWet.connect(revOut);
        last = revOut;
        }
        last.connect(analyser);
        analyser.connect(audioCtx.destination);
        return source;
        }
        function makeImpulse(duration) {
        const sr = audioCtx.sampleRate;
        const len = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sr * duration));
        const buf = audioCtx.createBuffer(2, len, sr);
        for (let ch = 0; ch < 2; ch++) {
        const d = buf.getChannelData(ch);
        for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        d[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - i / len, 2.5);
        }
        }
        return buf;
        }
        btnPlay.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!audioBuffer) return;
        await audioCtx.resume();
        if (isPlaying) {
        stopPlayback();
        return;
        }
        const src = buildGraph(audioBuffer);
        const offset = pausedAt;
        src.start(0, offset);
        src.onended = () => {
        if (isPlaying) {
        isPlaying = false;
        pausedAt = 0;
        updatePlayBtn();
        cancelAnimationFrame(playheadFrame);
        cancelAnimationFrame(spectrumFrame);
        playhead.style.display = 'none';
        }
        };
        source = src;
        startedAt = audioCtx.currentTime - offset;
        isPlaying = true;
        pausedAt = 0;
        updatePlayBtn();
        drawPlayhead();
        drawSpectrum();
        });
        btnStop.addEventListener('click', () => {
        stopPlayback();
        pausedAt = 0;
        document.getElementById('curTime').textContent = '0.00s';
        });
        function stopPlayback() {
        if (isPlaying && audioCtx) {
        pausedAt = Math.max(0, Math.min(audioBuffer ? audioBuffer.duration : 0, audioCtx.currentTime - startedAt));
        }
        cleanupSource();
        isPlaying = false;
        cancelAnimationFrame(playheadFrame);
        cancelAnimationFrame(spectrumFrame);
        playhead.style.display = 'none';
        updatePlayBtn();
        }
        function updatePlayBtn() {
        btnPlay.textContent = isPlaying ? '⏸ PAUSE' : '▶ PLAY';
        }
        function currentTime() {
        if (!audioBuffer) return 0;
        return isPlaying ? (audioCtx.currentTime - startedAt) : pausedAt;
        }
        function drawWaveform() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('waveCanvas');
        const wrap = document.getElementById('waveWrap');
        const logicalW = wrap.clientWidth || wrap.offsetWidth || 600;
        const logicalH = wrap.clientHeight || wrap.offsetHeight || 100;
        canvas.width = logicalW * window.devicePixelRatio;
        canvas.height = logicalH * window.devicePixelRatio;
        canvas.style.width = logicalW + 'px';
        canvas.style.height = logicalH + 'px';
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const W = canvas.width;
        const H = canvas.height;
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
        if (!audioBuffer) return;
        const data = audioBuffer.getChannelData(0);
        const step = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(data.length / W));
        const mid = H / 2;
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e1e35';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, mid);
        ctx.lineTo(W, mid);
        ctx.stroke();
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, W, 0);
        grad.addColorStop(0, '#00ffaa');
        grad.addColorStop(0.5, '#7b5ea7');
        grad.addColorStop(1, '#ff3366');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        for (let i = 0; i < W; i++) {
        let min = 1;
        let max = -1;
        for (let j = 0; j < step; j++) {
        const idx = i * step + j;
        const v = idx < data.length ? data[idx] : 0;
        if (v < min) min = v;
        if (v > max) max = v;
        }
        const y1 = mid + min * mid * 0.92;
        const y2 = mid + max * mid * 0.92;
        ctx.fillRect(i, y1, 1, Math.max(y2 - y1, 1));
        }
        updateSelOverlay();
        }
        function clientXToFrac(clientX) {
        const r = waveWrap.getBoundingClientRect();
        return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (clientX - r.left) / r.width));
        }
        waveWrap.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
        if (!audioBuffer) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        isDragging = true;
        dragMoved = false;
        dragStartX = clientXToFrac(e.clientX);
        selStartSec = dragStartX * audioBuffer.duration;
        selEndSec = selStartSec;
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        updateSelLabels();
        });
        function handleMove(clientX) {
        if (!isDragging || !audioBuffer) return;
        const frac = clientXToFrac(clientX);
        const t = frac * audioBuffer.duration;
        const anchor = dragStartX * audioBuffer.duration;
        if (Math.abs(frac - dragStartX) > 0.002) {
        dragMoved = true;
        }
        selStartSec = Math.min(anchor, t);
        selEndSec = Math.max(anchor, t);
        updateSelOverlay();
        updateSelLabels();
        }
        function handleEnd(clientX) {
        if (!isDragging || !audioBuffer) return;
        isDragging = false;
        const frac = clientXToFrac(clientX);
        const t = frac * audioBuffer.duration;
        const anchor = dragStartX * audioBuffer.duration;
        selStartSec = Math.min(anchor, t);
        selEndSec = Math.max(anchor, t);
        if (dragMoved && Math.abs(selEndSec - selStartSec) >= MIN_SELECTION_SEC) {
        updateSelOverlay();
        btnCut.disabled = false;
        clickSelectStart = null;
        suppressNextClick = true;
        } else {
        selStartSec = null;
        selEndSec = null;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        updateSelLabels();
        if (dragMoved) {
        suppressNextClick = true;
        }
        }
        updateSelLabels();
        }
        window.addEventListener('mousemove', e => handleMove(e.clientX));
        window.addEventListener('mouseup', e => handleEnd(e.clientX));
        waveWrap.addEventListener('click', e => {
        if (!audioBuffer) return;
        if (suppressNextClick) {
        suppressNextClick = false;
        return;
        }
        if (isDragging) return;
        const frac = clientXToFrac(e.clientX);
        const t = frac * audioBuffer.duration;
        if (clickSelectStart === null) {
        clickSelectStart = t;
        selStartSec = t;
        selEndSec = t;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        updateSelLabels();
        return;
        }
        selStartSec = Math.min(clickSelectStart, t);
        selEndSec = Math.max(clickSelectStart, t);
        clickSelectStart = null;
        if (Math.abs(selEndSec - selStartSec) < MIN_SELECTION_SEC) {
        selStartSec = null;
        selEndSec = null;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        } else {
        updateSelOverlay();
        btnCut.disabled = false;
        }
        updateSelLabels();
        });
        waveWrap.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
        if (!audioBuffer) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        isDragging = true;
        dragMoved = false;
        dragStartX = clientXToFrac(e.touches[0].clientX);
        selStartSec = dragStartX * audioBuffer.duration;
        selEndSec = selStartSec;
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        updateSelLabels();
        }, { passive: false });
        window.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        e.preventDefault();
        handleMove(e.touches[0].clientX);
        }, { passive: false });
        window.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
        if (!isDragging) return;
        const lastX = e.changedTouches[0].clientX;
        handleEnd(lastX);
        }, { passive: false });
        function updateSelOverlay() {
        if (selStartSec === null || selEndSec === null || !audioBuffer) return;
        const dur = audioBuffer.duration;
        const s = (selStartSec / dur) * 100;
        const w = ((selEndSec - selStartSec) / dur) * 100;
        selOverlay.style.left = s + '%';
        selOverlay.style.width = w + '%';
        selOverlay.style.display = 'block';
        }
        function updateSelLabels() {
        document.getElementById('selStart').textContent = selStartSec !== null ? fmt(selStartSec) : '—';
        document.getElementById('selEnd').textContent = selEndSec !== null ? fmt(selEndSec) : '—';
        }
        function drawPlayhead() {
        if (!isPlaying || !audioBuffer) return;
        const t = currentTime();
        const pct = Math.min(t / audioBuffer.duration, 1);
        playhead.style.display = 'block';
        playhead.style.left = (pct * 100) + '%';
        document.getElementById('curTime').textContent = fmt(t);
        playheadFrame = requestAnimationFrame(drawPlayhead);
        }
        function resizeSpectrum() {
        const c = document.getElementById('spectrumCanvas');
        const p = c.parentElement;
        if (!p) return;
        c.width = (p.clientWidth || 600) * window.devicePixelRatio;
        c.height = 140 * window.devicePixelRatio;
        c.style.width = (p.clientWidth || 600) + 'px';
        c.style.height = '140px';
        }
        function drawSpectrum() {
        if (!isPlaying || !analyser) return;
        const canvas = document.getElementById('spectrumCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const W = canvas.width;
        const H = canvas.height;
        const bufLen = analyser.frequencyBinCount;
        const data = new Uint8Array(bufLen);
        analyser.getByteFrequencyData(data);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#07070f';
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
        const barW = W / bufLen * 2.5;
        const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, H, 0, 0);
        grad.addColorStop(0, '#00ffaa');
        grad.addColorStop(0.6, '#7b5ea7');
        grad.addColorStop(1, '#ff3366');
        for (let i = 0; i < bufLen; i++) {
        const v = data[i] / 255;
        const bh = v * H;
        const x = i * (barW + 1);
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(x, H - bh, barW, bh);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff30';
        ctx.fillRect(x, H - bh - 2, barW, 2);
        }
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#1e1e3044';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        [0.25, 0.5, 0.75].forEach(f => {
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, H * f);
        ctx.lineTo(W, H * f);
        ctx.stroke();
        });
        spectrumFrame = requestAnimationFrame(drawSpectrum);
        }
        document.getElementById('btnCut').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (!audioBuffer || selStartSec === null || selEndSec === null) return;
        const s = Math.floor(selStartSec * audioBuffer.sampleRate);
        const e2 = Math.floor(selEndSec * audioBuffer.sampleRate);
        const len = e2 - s;
        if (len <= 0) return;
        const ch = audioBuffer.numberOfChannels;
        const clipBuf = audioCtx.createBuffer(ch, len, audioBuffer.sampleRate);
        for (let c = 0; c < ch; c++) {
        clipBuf.getChannelData(c).set(audioBuffer.getChannelData(c).subarray(s, e2));
        }
        const offCtx = new OfflineAudioContext(ch, len, audioBuffer.sampleRate);
        const src = offCtx.createBufferSource();
        src.buffer = clipBuf;
        let last = src;
        const bf = offCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        bf.type = 'lowshelf';
        bf.frequency.value = 200;
        bf.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sBass').value);
        const mf = offCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        mf.type = 'peaking';
        mf.frequency.value = 1000;
        mf.Q.value = 1;
        mf.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sMid').value);
        const tf = offCtx.createBiquadFilter();
        tf.type = 'highshelf';
        tf.frequency.value = 5000;
        tf.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sTreb').value);
        const gn = offCtx.createGain();
        gn.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sGain').value);
        last.connect(bf);
        bf.connect(mf);
        mf.connect(tf);
        tf.connect(gn);
        last = gn;
        if (chorusOn) {
        const dry = offCtx.createGain();
        const wet = offCtx.createGain();
        const mix = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sMix').value);
        dry.gain.value = 1 - mix;
        wet.gain.value = mix;
        const d1 = offCtx.createDelay(0.1);
        const d2 = offCtx.createDelay(0.1);
        d1.delayTime.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sDelay').value) / 1000;
        d2.delayTime.value = d1.delayTime.value * 0.9;
        const lfo = offCtx.createOscillator();
        lfo.type = 'sine';
        lfo.frequency.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRate').value);
        const lg = offCtx.createGain();
        lg.gain.value = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sDepth').value) * 0.005;
        lfo.connect(lg);
        lg.connect(d1.delayTime);
        lg.connect(d2.delayTime);
        lfo.start();
        const mix2 = offCtx.createGain();
        last.connect(dry);
        last.connect(d1);
        last.connect(d2);
        d1.connect(wet);
        d2.connect(wet);
        dry.connect(mix2);
        wet.connect(mix2);
        last = mix2;
        }
        if (reverbOn) {
        const conv = offCtx.createConvolver();
        conv.buffer = makeImpulseOff(offCtx, parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRevTime').value));
        const rw = offCtx.createGain();
        const rd = offCtx.createGain();
        const ro = offCtx.createGain();
        const rm = parseFloat(document.getElementById('sRevMix').value);
        rw.gain.value = rm;
        rd.gain.value = 1 - rm;
        last.connect(rd);
        last.connect(conv);
        conv.connect(rw);
        rd.connect(ro);
        rw.connect(ro);
        last = ro;
        }
        last.connect(offCtx.destination);
        src.start();
        const rendered = await offCtx.startRendering();
        const wav = encodeWAV(rendered);
        const blob = new Blob([wav], { type: 'audio/wav' });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const color = clipColors[colorIdx % clipColors.length];
        colorIdx++;
        const clip = {
        id: Date.now() + Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000),
        name: `${fileName}_${fmt(selStartSec).replace(':','m')}–${fmt(selEndSec).replace(':','m')}s`,
        duration: selEndSec - selStartSec,
        url,
        color,
        buffer: rendered,
        playingSource: null
        };
        clips.push(clip);
        renderClips();
        });
        function makeImpulseOff(ctx, duration) {
        const sr = ctx.sampleRate;
        const len = Math.max(1, Math.floor(sr * duration));
        const buf = ctx.createBuffer(2, len, sr);
        for (let c = 0; c < 2; c++) {
        const d = buf.getChannelData(c);
        for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
        d[i] = (Math.random() * 2 - 1) * Math.pow(1 - i / len, 2.5);
        }
        }
        return buf;
        }
        function encodeWAV(buffer) {
        const numCh = buffer.numberOfChannels;
        const sr = buffer.sampleRate;
        const samples = buffer.length;
        const ab = new ArrayBuffer(44 + samples * numCh * 2);
        const view = new DataView(ab);
        const writeStr = (off, s) => {
        for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
        view.setUint8(off + i, s.charCodeAt(i));
        }
        };
        writeStr(0, 'RIFF');
        view.setUint32(4, 36 + samples * numCh * 2, true);
        writeStr(8, 'WAVE');
        writeStr(12, 'fmt ');
        view.setUint32(16, 16, true);
        view.setUint16(20, 1, true);
        view.setUint16(22, numCh, true);
        view.setUint32(24, sr, true);
        view.setUint32(28, sr * numCh * 2, true);
        view.setUint16(32, numCh * 2, true);
        view.setUint16(34, 16, true);
        writeStr(36, 'data');
        view.setUint32(40, samples * numCh * 2, true);
        let offset = 44;
        for (let i = 0; i < samples; i++) {
        for (let c = 0; c < numCh; c++) {
        const s = Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, buffer.getChannelData(c)[i]));
        view.setInt16(offset, s < 0 ? s * 0x8000 : s * 0x7FFF, true);
        offset += 2;
        }
        }
        return ab;
        }
        function renderClips() {
        const list = document.getElementById('clipsList');
        if (!clips.length) {
        list.innerHTML = '<div class="empty-clips">Zaznacz fragment i kliknij ✂ WYTNIJ</div>';
        return;
        }
        list.innerHTML = '';
        clips.forEach(clip => {
        const div = document.createElement('div');
        div.className = 'clip-item';
        div.innerHTML = `
        <div class="clip-color" style="background:${clip.color}"></div>
        <div class="clip-info">
        <div class="clip-name">${clip.name}</div>
        <div class="clip-meta">${fmt(clip.duration)} · WAV · kupr ${chorusOn ? 'ON' : 'OFF'}</div>
        </div>
        <button class="clip-play-btn" data-id="${clip.id}">▶</button>
        <a class="clip-dl" href="${clip.url}" download="${clip.name}.wav" title="Pobierz">↓</a>
        <button class="clip-del" data-id="${clip.id}" title="Usuń">✕</button>
        `;
        list.appendChild(div);
        });
        list.querySelectorAll('.clip-play-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => playClip(parseInt(btn.dataset.id, 10), btn));
        });
        list.querySelectorAll('.clip-del').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        clips = clips.filter(c => c.id !== parseInt(btn.dataset.id, 10));
        renderClips();
        });
        });
        }
        async function playClip(id, btn) {
        const clip = clips.find(c => c.id === id);
        if (!clip) return;
        await initCtx();
        await audioCtx.resume();
        if (clip.playingSource) {
        try { clip.playingSource.stop(); } catch (e) {}
        clip.playingSource = null;
        btn.textContent = '▶';
        return;
        }
        const src = buildGraph(clip.buffer);
        src.start();
        src.onended = () => {
        clip.playingSource = null;
        btn.textContent = '▶';
        };
        clip.playingSource = src;
        btn.textContent = '■';
        }
        btnClear.addEventListener('click', () => {
        stopPlayback();
        selStartSec = null;
        selEndSec = null;
        clickSelectStart = null;
        isDragging = false;
        dragMoved = false;
        suppressNextClick = false;
        selOverlay.style.display = 'none';
        btnCut.disabled = true;
        updateSelLabels();
        });
        document.getElementById('toggleChorus').addEventListener('click', function () {
        chorusOn = !chorusOn;
        this.classList.toggle('on', chorusOn);
        });
        document.getElementById('toggleReverb').addEventListener('click', function () {
        reverbOn = !reverbOn;
        this.classList.toggle('on', reverbOn);
        });
        function bindSlider(id, valId, decimals = 2) {
        const sl = document.getElementById(id);
        const vl = document.getElementById(valId);
        sl.addEventListener('input', () => {
        vl.textContent = parseFloat(sl.value).toFixed(decimals);
        });
        }
        bindSlider('sDepth', 'vDepth');
        bindSlider('sRate', 'vRate', 1);
        bindSlider('sDelay', 'vDelay', 0);
        bindSlider('sMix', 'vMix');
        bindSlider('sRevTime', 'vRevTime', 1);
        bindSlider('sRevMix', 'vRevMix');
        bindSlider('sBass', 'vBass', 1);
        bindSlider('sMid', 'vMid', 1);
        bindSlider('sTreb', 'vTreb', 1);
        bindSlider('sGain', 'vGain', 1);
        function fmt(s) {
        if (!s && s !== 0) return '—';
        const m = Math.floor(s / 60);
        const sec = (s % 60).toFixed(2).padStart(5, '0');
        return m > 0 ? `${m}m${sec}s` : `${sec}s`;
        }
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
        if (audioBuffer) drawWaveform();
        resizeSpectrum();
        });
        </script>
        </body>
        </html>

        Stopka

        Nawigacja po stopce

        • Warunki
        • Prywatność
        • Bezpieczeństwo
        • Status
        • Społeczność
        • Dokumentacja
        • Kontakt
        You can’t perform that action at this time.
